summary: ES-NOTIFICATION-SVC-001 passes all 5 hard gates: 2 frozen RHRs with contiguous coverage, all inputs confirmed Frozen, VH outcome assessment complete with SM-N level detail, valid 'maintain' signal with 4-sentence rationale, and 3 recommended actions with complete fields.

warnings.description: SM-1 (notification disable rate) verdict is 'Missed' at the 60-day mark (7.8% vs <6% target). The recommended actions include monthly monitoring of this metric. Consider whether this near-miss warrants a 'watch' signal at the next ES if the metric does not cross the 6% threshold.

The p99 Latency compliance trend (99.71% → 99.62%) is noted as potentially narrowing with load growth. The recommended monitoring action covers this, but the ES does not quantify the load growth rate or project when the margin might become concerning.
